narration: Let’s simplify: carbon sinks are natural systems that absorb carbon dioxide.

narration: Oceans are the largest carbon sinks on Earth, capturing about a quarter of our CO2 emissions.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Oceans are the largest carbon sinks on Earth, capturing about a quarter of our CO2 emissions.

narration: Through photosynthesis, marine plants and phytoplankton play a vital role in this process.
